message:
test(supply-chain): add verified-level evidence builders and fix promotion/demotion cycle tests

Introduce make_verified_input() helper that constructs CertificationInput
at Verified evidence level, enabling tests to exercise the full promotion
and demotion range. Fix three test functions that were incorrectly testing
with default evidence levels:

- test_promotion_adjacent_only: use Standard-level setup to demonstrate
  adjacent promotion rules correctly
- test_evidence_preservation_across_adjustments: verify evidence_derived_level
  (not just current level) is preserved across adjustments
- test_promote_demote_cycle: use Verified-level input so promote/demote
  roundtrip verifies evidence_derived_level stays at original evidence-backed
  level throughout the cycle

Adjust test timestamps to account for new setup and demote steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
